libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No required environment variables or system properties. Generated tests should prefer deterministic in-test sources such as MapPropertySource or built-in .properties resources; if exercising SystemPropertiesPropertySource or EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource, set and clear those values inside the test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation shows YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON parsing require optional hoplite-* parser modules, so tests that choose those formats would need an added parser dependency; this is not required for meaningful hoplite-core coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core is self-contained for meaningful core coverage: its resolved runtime dependencies are Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines only, and core exposes built-in MapPropertySource, Java .properties parsing, environment/system property sources, default decoders, and config binding without requiring Docker or extra test dependencies.
